barRaise.topFinding: Seventh straight cycle at needs-attention on the same lone HIGH, and the working tree is now six days dirty. v0.98.10 is fully authored - GDD pill v0.98.10 (docs/GDD.html:1380), the paired footprint-rebalance changelog entry (:4913), and the roster-wide footprint edits in source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd - but HEAD is still 3918336 (v0.98.9, 2026-06-15) and project.godot config/version still reads 0.98.9 (:15). The FUSE-truncation-unacceptable files (GDD.html, project.godot) have sat dirty the whole stretch, and CLAUDE.md's own commit-per-patch hazard exists precisely because stacking versions between commits is how the May 2026 incident lost eight versions of work. Nothing structural blocks the commit: the doc-contradiction the 06-19 audit gated on is cleared, and the only open substance is the deferred defense-balance review plus three long-carried doc MEDIUMs (the v0.80.1 ARCHITECTURE.md, the 2D-residual GDD pointers, the missing world_3d profiler baseline). Run scripts/release.ps1 to land v0.98.10 or revert the rebalance; either way, stop the seventh cycle. The stalled tip is 2026-06-29, eight days out.

actions.title: Run scripts/release.ps1 to commit + push v0.98.10 so HEAD, project.godot (0.98.9 -> 0.98.10), and the GDD pill reconcile and the dirty GDD.html / project.godot / building_catalog_3d.gd stop sitting exposed a seventh cycle (or revert the rebalance if it is not landing). Do not let an eighth cycle start.

Run the deferred defense-balance review the v0.98.10 changelog flagged: the footprint rebalance pushed most buildings to 2x2+, which grants +1 defense under the v0.34.0 derived rule (GDD:1650). Confirm the roster-wide buff is intended or re-derive the affected values.

2D-residual GDD sweep: re-point the tile-constant note (GDD:4816 still cites retired enemy_base.gd / fog_of_war.gd / noise_heatmap.gd), the auto_pause frame-tick rows (~4648), and era-stamp the M3 roadmap deliverables (~2083).

Capture and log a world_3d profiler run at 1000-3000 enemies in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md (25 rows, no 3D-crowd baseline) before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; carried ~13 cycles and compounded by the footprint-density bump.
Refresh or retire docs/ARCHITECTURE.md off its v0.80.1 / 2D-stack snapshot (GDD cites it as the synced source) and delete the orphaned source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid) in the same pass.

After the commit (which self-corrects workTreeClean), repoint the dashboard roster metrics (units/buildings/enemies/tests all read 0) at the 3D roster counts or mark them migrating so the card reflects live work.
